items.headline: Berlayer BTOs should include 5-room HDB flats, even if prices run high
items.summary: Business Times argues the upcoming Berlayer BTO launch in Buona Vista should offer 5-room flats, even though the prime location will push prices well above what most HDB launches charge.
items.meaning: If you plan to ballot for Berlayer, go in knowing that larger flat types there will cost significantly more than equivalent flats elsewhere, so budget accordingly.

items.headline: New Lentor condo pitches park views and Thomson-East Coast Line access to family buyers
items.summary: The Straits Times profiles a new condominium in Lentor highlighting its proximity to greenery, a Thomson-East Coast Line MRT station, and a lively neighbourhood as its main draws for families.
items.meaning: If you are tracking new launches in Lentor, this gives an early read on how the latest project is positioning itself and what it is selling.

items.headline: June BTO results reveal the real logic behind how Singaporeans pick their flats
items.summary: An analysis of June BTO application data uncovers the patterns driving demand across towns, with some locations seeing heavily lopsided competition between flat types and others far more balanced.
items.meaning: Knowing which towns and flat types were most oversubscribed in June helps you size up your odds and decide where to focus your next ballot.

items.headline: Singapore landed home deals have slowed in 2026, but sellers are still calling the shots
items.summary: Landed property transactions have fallen in 2026, yet prices remain firm because supply is thin and most owners are under no pressure to sell.
items.meaning: If you are hoping a quieter landed market means you can negotiate a lower price, you will likely find sellers holding firm.

items.headline: Five freehold 3-bedroom condos priced from under $1.7M
items.summary: Stacked Homes identifies five freehold three-bedroom condominiums available below $1.7 million, spread across different parts of Singapore for buyers who want permanent land tenure without a $2M budget.
items.meaning: If you want a freehold three-bedder without stretching to $2M, these are the specific projects and areas worth looking at first.

items.headline: Condo resale prices rebound in May 2026 even as fewer deals close
items.summary: Resale condominium prices rose in May 2026, reversing a recent dip, though transaction volumes fell as buyers became more selective about which units they would pay up for.
items.meaning: If you are waiting for resale condo prices to soften before buying, May data does not support that strategy.

items.headline: 32-year-old executive HDB flat in Kallang/Whampoa sells for record $1.412M
items.summary: An executive flat in Kallang/Whampoa, over three decades old, changed hands at $1.412 million, a new resale price record for that town.
items.meaning: Large older HDB flats in central areas keep setting records, which matters whether you are pricing one to sell or budgeting to buy resale nearby.

items.headline: The Johor-Singapore RTS Link will shake up Woodlands property, but differently for buyers and landlords
items.summary: The coming Rapid Transit System Link between Johor Bahru and Woodlands is expected to lift interest in north Singapore property, but the benefit to buyers seeking capital gains differs from what landlords chasing rental income should expect.
items.meaning: If you own or are buying in Woodlands, the RTS Link is a real factor worth weighing, but how much it helps you depends on whether you plan to sell or rent out.
